app.title: Poker
app.tagline: Shared decision-making, in real time — Poker Planning & Delegation Poker.

home.title: Decide together, in real time
home.intro: Poker brings together Poker Planning and Delegation Poker: create a room, invite your team, vote and reveal the results together.
home.join_intro: Got a room code or a link? Jump into the ongoing game.

support.title: Support

free.title: Free for the essentials
free.desc: Real-time anonymous rooms stay free, no account needed.

infra.title: Hosting & infrastructure
infra.desc: Servers, SSL certificates and email delivery have a real cost.

support.cta_desc: Donations go through GitHub Sponsors: a one-off gesture or regular support, at your own pace.
support.cta_note: You'll be redirected to GitHub Sponsors in a new tab.
support.thanks_desc: Thank you for keeping an independent tool alive — no ads, no tracking.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.intro: Create a room for free in seconds. Move to a team plan for the Delegation Board, history and custom appearance.
pricing.free_f1: Delegation Poker & Poker Planning in real time
pricing.note: 20 people max per room · 20 members max per team.

about.title: About
about.company_body: Poker is published by Foxugly SRL, a Belgian company. We build simple tools for teams that decide together.
about.legal_body: Publisher: Foxugly SRL — Belgium. Contact: info@foxugly.com. Hosting: Amazon Web Services (Ireland, eu-west-1 region). Anonymous rooms are temporary and expire after a period of inactivity.
about.technical_body: A real-time application: Django and Django Channels (WebSocket) backend, Angular and PrimeNG frontend. Multilingual (5 languages), light and dark themes.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: This notice explains what data Poker handles, why, and how we protect it. Poker is operated by Foxugly SRL (Belgium).

data.title: Data we handle
data.body: Anonymous rooms work without an account: we only keep a temporary nickname and your votes for the duration of the session. If you create an account, we store your email address, display name and teams.

usage.title: How we use data
usage.body: Your data is used solely to run the service: authentication, team management, session history and transactional emails. We never sell or rent your data, and we show no advertising.

retention.title: Retention and hosting
retention.body: Anonymous rooms are temporary and expire after a period of inactivity. Account data is kept for as long as the account exists. Hosting is provided by Amazon Web Services within the European Union (Ireland, eu-west-1 region).

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Under the GDPR, you can request access to, correction or deletion of your data, as well as closure of your account. Contact us to exercise these rights.

privacy.contact_lead: For any privacy question or to exercise your rights, contact us at:

features.title: Features
features.intro: Start free with real-time anonymous rooms. Go paid for teams, history and the delegation board.
